info.title: SDKWork BirdCoder App API
info.description: Canonical BirdCoder coding-workbench App API authority.

tags.name: intelligence
tags.description: Workspace, project, document binding, sandbox binding, runtime location, and Git resources.

tags.name: system
tags.description: System descriptor, health, route catalog, and runtime metadata resources.

get.description: Get the BirdCoder application descriptor. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.
Get BirdCoder application health. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.
List unified API routes. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.
Get runtime metadata. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

post.description: Create project. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single user principal.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single workspace.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: One-based page number used for offset-mode pagination.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20 and must not exceed 200.

put.summary: Create or update project sandbox binding
put.description: Create or update project sandbox binding. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Current resource version required for optimistic concurrency.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key scoped to the authenticated principal and operation.

409.description: Project sandbox-binding idempotency conflicts with another request.

428.description: Project sandbox-binding update requires Idempotency-Key; replacing an existing binding also requires If-Match.

parameters.description: Current resource version required for optimistic concurrency.

parameters.description: One-based page number used for offset-mode pagination.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20 and must not exceed 200.

post.description: Register project runtime location. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key scoped to the authenticated principal and operation.

409.description: Project runtime-location registration conflicts with existing state.

get.description: Get project runtime location. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

404.description: Project runtime location was not found.

patch.description: Update project runtime location. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Current resource version required for optimistic concurrency.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key scoped to the authenticated principal and operation.

404.description: Project runtime location was not found.

428.description: Project runtime-location update requires If-Match and Idempotency-Key.

delete.description: Delete project runtime location. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Current resource version required for optimistic concurrency.

404.description: Project runtime location was not found.

post.description: Rebind project runtime location. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Current resource version required for optimistic concurrency.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key scoped to the authenticated principal and operation.

200.description: Project runtime location rebound and returned to pending verification successfully.

404.description: Project runtime location was not found.

409.description: Project runtime-location rebind conflicts with existing state.

428.description: Project runtime-location rebind requires If-Match and Idempotency-Key.

post.description: Request project runtime-location verification. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Current resource version required for optimistic concurrency.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key scoped to the authenticated principal and operation.

202.description: Project runtime-location verification was requested successfully.

404.description: Project runtime location was not found.

409.description: Project runtime-location verification conflicts with existing state.

428.description: Project runtime-location verification requires If-Match and Idempotency-Key.

503.description: Project runtime-location verification target is unavailable.

get.description: List project runtime-location preferences. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: One-based page number used for offset-mode pagination.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20 and must not exceed 200.

put.description: Update project runtime-location preference. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Current resource version required for optimistic concurrency.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key scoped to the authenticated principal and operation.

404.description: Project or runtime location was not found.

409.description: Project runtime-location preference conflicts with existing state.

412.description: Project runtime-location preference version precondition failed.

428.description: Project runtime-location preference update requires Idempotency-Key.

absolutePath.description: Write-only absolute path for encrypted-at-rest registration. It is never returned.

displayName.description: Safe display label for the registered location.

documentId.description: Stable sdkwork-documents identifier; no cross-domain foreign key is created.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

displayName.description: Safe display label for this location.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.
Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

sandboxId.description: Opaque Drive sandbox identifier. This reference does not grant Drive access.

rootEntryId.description: Opaque Drive entry identifier selected as the project root.

logicalPath.description: Canonical sandbox-relative path using forward-slash segments. Empty means the sandbox root.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

BirdCoderProjectSandboxBinding.description: BirdCoder-owned binding to a Drive sandbox directory. Physical paths, provider roots, browser handles, and Tauri paths are never stored or returned. Every filesystem operation must authorize against Drive again.

defaultAgentProjectId.description: Stable sdkwork-agents project identifier; no cross-domain foreign key is created.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.

absolutePath.description: Write-only replacement absolute path for encrypted-at-rest registration. It is never returned.

anyOf.description: Safe display label for the rebound location.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.

anyOf.description: Safe display label for the runtime location.

logicalPath.description: Canonical sandbox-relative path using forward-slash segments. Empty means the sandbox root.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.
